comment: One thing I like about pintrest is that I can swipe through all of the pins on the home page. One thing I don't like is that when u scroll down on a pin for "more like it" it doesn't let u swipe through those pins. That makes it hard for me to read them. I would give five stars if this changed back to where u could swipe through them at all times.
key sentence: the home page, swipe through pins, more like it, scroll down, hard to read
the function of activity: Activity involves searching, accessing menus, filtering, viewing various content categories, managing pins, profiles, settings, creating, sharing, and navigating within the interface.
the sub-task list of state: [{'name': 'Create', 'description': 'Tab for creating something'}, {'name': 'Notifications', 'description': 'Tab for viewing notifications'}, {'name': 'Saved', 'description': 'Tab for viewing saved items'}, {'name': 'Avatar: Jane', 'description': 'Display the avatar for the user Jane'}, {'name': 'Access Search Page', 'description': 'Access the search page.'}, {'name': 'Browse content', 'description': 'Browse recommended pins.'}]

operations.event: click<button id=15 class ="com.pinterest:id/lego_pin_grid_cell_id" alt="Pin from 𝘾𝙧𝙞𝙨𝙩𝙚𝙡𝙡𝙚 🤍, This may contain: a girl is walking down the street with flowers and a duck in front of her">  </button>
